view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of a 'Simple online booking page' is supported by multiple pieces of evidence. Specifically, the 'customer-book-primary' step shows that a customer successfully booked a primary offer, which includes selecting a time slot and entering payment information. Additionally, the linked use case outlines the booking process, confirming that the necessary functionality is present and operational.
